title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on a clear day】

whistle, scat & humming

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Whistle Samba – Maria Toledo" into "Wives and Lovers – Toots Thielemans".

Please enjoy the transition from the whistling sound that rides on the rhythm of a South American samba to the whistling sound that rides on a stylish waltz.

今回は「WHISTLE SAMBA - MARIA TOLEDO」から「Wives and Lovers · Toots Thielemans」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
南米らしいサンバのリズムに乗った口笛の音色から、小洒落たワルツに乗せた口笛の音色への繋ぎをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZxoSOhQEXVU
